title: The Seventh Juror
writer: Francis Didelot, Jacques Robert, Pierre Laroche
actors: Bernard Blier, Danièle Delorme, Maurice Biraud
plot: In a moment of madness a respectable pharmacist kills a young woman who is sun-bathing by a lake. Unable to take in what he has done, he flees from the scene of the crime and behaves as if nothing has happened.
